title: Mellow Bitter Australian Oats Casserole
description: A savory, bitter oat casserole with a soffritto base, perfect for midnight cravings and diabetic-friendly diets.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a 20cm casserole dish over medium heat.
Add diced onion, carrot, and celery to the dish and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Mix in the rolled oats, erythritol, and a pinch of salt, ensuring the oats coat evenly with the vegetable mixture.
Pour in the unsweetened almond milk and melt the butter, stirring continuously until the mixture thickens.
Transfer the casserole to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the oats are cooked through.
Remove from the oven and let the casserole rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, optionally with a splash of soy sauce or a squeeze of lemon for extra flavor.
Enjoy this bitter, midnight-craving Australian oat casserole as a savory snack or light dinner.
